title: digitaria leucophaea
intro: Digitaria leucophaea is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly known as white finger grass or white hair grass. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Digitaria leucophaea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of this plant involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
